entries.claim_summary: Subject: Rep. Rohit 'Ro' Khanna (D-CA-17), sworn in January 3, 2017, currently fifth-term Member of the 119th Congress.
entries.substrate: lake.congress_members WHERE bioguide_id='K000389'
entries.predicate_grep: predicate ILIKE '%k000389%' OR predicate ILIKE '%h4ca12055%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%bioguide%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%cand_id%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%sworn_in%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%ca17%tenure%'

entries.what_shows: Anchors standing + tenure-pre-tenure transaction filter applied throughout the audit substrate (per .claude/rules/stock-act-audit.md §Pre-tenure filter MANDATORY).

entries.claim_summary: Committee assignments confer MNPI access: HASC (NDAA / DoD primes), HOGR/HSGO (HHS/CMS/FDA), House Budget.

entries.predicate_grep: predicate ILIKE '%khanna%committee_assignment%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%hasc%' OR predicate ILIKE '%khanna%oversight%'

entries.what_shows: Anchors the §208 conflict-of-interest predicate + the §§3-4 MNPI convergence-by-jurisdiction framing carried into Counts 1, 2, 3.

entries.claim_summary: Household composition: respondent + spouse Ritu Ahuja Khanna (SP) + one dependent child (DC); spouse named trustee + substantial contributor of Ahuja Charitable Foundation (EIN 34-1685088).

entries.what_shows: Establishes the spouse-trustee predicate operatively load-bearing for the spouse-asset disclosure scope inquiry under EIGA.

entries.claim_summary: Methodology footer: substrates enumerated (House Clerk PTR / PFD via Gemini per-page + canonical view; FEC Forms 3/3X/5/24/3L/1 + Schedule E via bulk-data; Senate LDA bulk XML + LD-203; FARA.gov; IRS 990-PF e-file corpus; Clerk roll-call; USAspending; CMS rulemaking; FDA AdCom calendar; SEC 8-K/4/5; Cal-Access Form 497; SF Ethics). Dedup: PTR via earliest-disclosure canonical view; Schedule E via (committee_id, candidate_id, transaction_id). Composite score: dollar_weighted_midpoint_late × (worst_days_late/365) × ln(1 + n_tx_late). Statute currency: every operative cite resolves via public.v_statute_current.
